SEARCH.HERO_TITLE: Learn Irregular Verb Forms Easily and Playfully!
SEARCH.INTRO: Have you ever wondered which form of an irregular verb is correct? For example, become or became, went or gone? This site is here to help!
SEARCH.LEARN_PLAY_BEFORE: Boost your knowledge with a fun and interactive
SEARCH.FIND_FORMS_BODY: Simply enter any irregular verb into the input field below to instantly discover whether it’s the first, second, or third form. For each form, you can also view AI-generated example sentences in an expandable panel, making learning contextual and engaging!
SEARCH.EXPLORE_BEFORE: Want a complete reference? Browse our
SEARCH.EXPLORE_AFTER: , where you can find all verbs available in our database, neatly organized with their forms. Use it as a study guide or a quick lookup tool to improve your English effortlessly!
SEARCH.CLOSING_LINE2: has never been this useful and fun! Try it now!

VERB_INPUT.MIN_SEARCH_LEN: Enter at least {{min}} characters to search
VERB_INPUT.MAX_LEN: Search text is too long (max {{max}} characters)
VERB_INPUT.PATTERN: Use letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes only

VERBS.TITLE: Complete List of Irregular Verbs
VERBS.INTRO_1: Explore a comprehensive table of irregular verbs to enhance your English skills!
VERBS.INTRO_2: This page provides a structured list of verbs with their first, second, and third forms, making it easy to study and reference.
VERBS.TABLE_ARIA: Complete list of irregular verbs with base, past simple and past participle forms
VERBS.CARDS_ARIA: Irregular verbs in a compact card layout for small screens

GAME.VERB_FORM_ACTION: Verb form: {{item}}. Click or press Enter to place
GAME.ANNOUNCE_WIN: Congratulations! You completed all {{max}} verbs! Final time: {{time}}
GAME.ANNOUNCE_LOSE: Game over. Your score is {{score}} out of {{max}}. Time: {{time}}

HOW_TO_PLAY.TITLE: How to play?
HOW_TO_PLAY.GOAL_TEXT: Match the correct forms (I, II, and III) of 50 irregular verbs as quickly as possible.
HOW_TO_PLAY.DRAG_TEXT: Select the correct verb forms and place them in the appropriate boxes labeled I, II, and III.
HOW_TO_PLAY.PROGRESS_TIME_TEXT: A timer at the top shows how long you've been playing.
HOW_TO_PLAY.PROGRESS_SCORE_TEXT: Displays the number of correctly matched verbs so far.
HOW_TO_PLAY.CHECK_TEXT: Once you've filled in the forms, click the Check button or press Enter to see if your answers are correct.
HOW_TO_PLAY.CHALLENGE_TEXT: Aim to complete all 50 verbs in the shortest time possible!

GAME_OVER.WELL_DONE: Well done! You managed to drop all forms correctly!

GAME_PROMO.BODY: You have to drag and drop the forms for 50 irregular verbs into the boxes as fast as possible. Good luck!

STATS.TITLE: Learning statistics
STATS.INTRO: Charts use your last finished games (stored in this browser) and the full verb list for pattern distribution.
STATS.SCORE_HISTORY_HINT: Each bar is one finished session in chronological order.
STATS.PATTERN_HINT: How verbs in the database group: AAA (same three forms), ABA, ABB, or ABC (three distinct forms).
STATS.PROGRESS_HINT: Cumulative count of finished games by session date (oldest to newest).
STATS.EMPTY_HISTORY: Finish a game to see score bars here. Scores are saved when the game ends.
STATS.EMPTY_PROGRESS: No finished games yet — play a round to track progress.
STATS.VERBS_LOADING: Loading verb data for the chart…
